changes.reason: Config-only dormant attribution probe. Add delta_charm_breakout_long to the VALID_0DTE router so the existing playbook can prove whether this is a distinct option-flow/charm continuation slice or just cannibalizes squeeze/charm-wall trades. Full replacement preserves all currently routed valid-0DTE profiles.

Enable only the dormant delta/charm breakout concept after routing it. This is a narrow discovery run, not a broad filter or take-profit retune, and it leaves VALID_0DTE incumbent profile parameters unchanged.

expected_effect: Should reveal whether delta/charm breakout captures incremental VALID_0DTE continuation PnL or reroutes low-quality entries away from existing squeeze/charm-wall/call-wall profiles. Accept only if total net profit stays within 98% of run_055, completed trades do not drop more than 10%, slow_12h remains 0, and squeeze plus charm_wall_breakaway combined PnL is not materially cannibalized. Main tradeoff is duplicate routing of an already-covered option-flow state.
label: delta-charm-breakout-attribution-probe
rationale: The leader is plateaued across run_044/run_050/run_055, and repeated call-wall/charm-wall/take-profit keysets are now either flat or profit-suppressive. The strategist track explicitly calls for new-regime router attribution. Activating delta_charm_breakout_long is the cleanest legal config-only discovery experiment: it changes no global vetoes, does not loosen missing/stale 0DTE behavior, and tests an underexplored VALID_0DTE option-flow concept against protected squeeze and charm-wall continuation edges.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: squeeze_long is clean but modest at 10 trades, $723 PnL, -214.2 worst MAE; charm_wall_breakaway_long is high expectancy with 5 trades, $987 PnL, -357 worst MAE. A dormant delta/charm breakout route may separate a related but distinct continuation regime without touching those incumbent thresholds.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The route may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize high-quality squeeze_long/charm_wall_breakaway_long entries without adding incremental PnL.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE strong option-flow/charm continuation state that is not cleanly captured by squeeze_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Positive standalone delta_charm_breakout_long PnL, total net profit >=98% of run_055, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze_long plus charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL, worst MAE no worse than -655.2, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long owns the -655.2 worst MAE but also contributes $640.5 from only two trades, including the largest winner. Static pruning has repeatedly risked suppressing profit, while path fields show the issue is delayed realization after early progress.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a two-trade profile and cut the rare convex winner unless validated against protected fast-winner retention and out-of-sample days.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long entry with wide target or extended ES-VWAP that fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce worst MAE below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short 12.3-day, high-win-rate, take-profit-only long scalper regime. The edge is broad across VALID_0DTE pullback/charm/squeeze, VALID_1DTE fallback, and a small convex call-wal...

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1315, 1DTE average/worst MAE flat or better than -124.6/-386.75, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL explicitly measured, total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves below -655.2 toward <= -513.4 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, >=98% total PnL, no slow trades, and protected fast-winner retention >=95%.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce affected-profile worst MAE while retaining >=90% pullback/charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, total score flat or better, slow_12h remains 0.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Charm Wall Pin-Avoid Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile positive standalone PnL or lower combined charm/pin worst MAE, total PnL >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Delta Charm Breakout Dormant Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Positive standalone PnL, no more than 10% degradation in squeeze/charm-wall combined PnL, total PnL >=98% of leader, worst MAE no worse than -513.4.

next_experiments.config_bias: Use a full valid-0DTE router attribution test for exactly one dormant pin-avoid concept plus minimal same-profile tuning. Do not activate multiple dormant profiles together.
next_experiments.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Split
next_experiments.primary_metric: Standalone dormant profile PnL, combined charm/pin/wall worst MAE, total risk-adjusted score, protected fast-winner retention.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep breakout_long_1dte baseline stable. Test companion routing only if legal, and measure cannibalization explicitly rather than tightening the current 1DTE winner.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Companion Split Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, 1DTE average/worst MAE, breakout_long_1dte retained trades/PnL, total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Isolate call_wall_acceptance_long only. Favor persistence/realization/sample-split research over global call-volume or setup-quality pruning.
next_experiments.name: Call-Wall Convex Tail Split
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE, call_wall_acceptance_long PnL retention >=70%, total PnL retention >=98%, total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Use narrow near-miss research around the already-enabled extended-VWAP rejection family. Avoid broad ES-VWAP max-distance, setup-quality, RSI, or structure-score floors.
next_experiments.name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Boundary Study
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE, retained total PnL >=98%, protected extended_vwap_winner retention >=95%, PnL/exposure flat or better.

next_experiments.config_bias: Treat STALE_0DTE separately from EXPIRED_0DTE if expressible. Do not disturb VALID_0DTE routing and do not remove the single EXPIRED_0DTE winner unless state targeting is explicit.
next_experiments.name: No-0DTE Data-State Efficiency Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Fallback PnL/hour, fallback worst MAE, unchanged VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count, total PnL retention >=98%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep option-map and order-book confirmation strict. Study squeeze as a clean continuation benchmark, not as a place to loosen admission.
next_experiments.name: Squeeze Clean Continuation Benchmark
next_experiments.primary_metric: squeeze_long PnL, squeeze worst MAE no worse than -214.2 to -250 tolerance, total net profit >=98%, total score flat or better.
